meta.title: How I Actually Make Viral AI Shorts - AI Cat CCTV Videos
meta.description:
Learn how to make viral AI shorts like the cat security camera videos and dancing cat meme.
These videos are going super viral right now! We have the dancing cat middle finger meme, the Animal CCTV videos and more. In this video I break down how to make them!

Tool I used for images -  http://openart.ai/home/?ref=cctv

Tool I used for animations - https://app.pixverse.ai/

Image prompt 1:
Clear black-and-white fisheye security camera footage at night, high contrast, slight VHS distortion, fine film grain. Only one adult tabby cat is in this scene. The single cat walks carefully along a narrow high-rise balcony railing with city streetlights glowing far below. It pauses, looks down, then leaps off the railing as if falling. The camera tilts and pans smoothly downward in one continuous motion, showing the city lights below. The same cat then climbs back up from a lower ledge beneath the railing It steps closer to the lens and stares directly into the camera. One continuous real-time take, natural motion, no slow motion. There are no duplicate cats — only one cat is visible in the entire video.

Image prompt 2: 
static shot, nighttime, clear black-and-white doorbell security camera footage with timestamp in corner. Slight fisheye perspective showing porch entry, faint street background with distant streetlights. From the start of the shot, a scruffy tabby cat is already walking straight toward the doorbell camera, centered in frame. It steadily approaches, paws landing softly on the porch steps, whiskers twitching, eyes fixed on the lens. The cat closes the distance until its face fills the frame, nose almost touching the camera. The motion ends with a close-up view — sharp whiskers, detailed fur texture, and wide eyes staring directly into the lens, just like a real doorbell visitor capture. Lighting from a single porch lamp casts natural 4:1 contrast with clear shadows, realistic night atmosphere

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
